question: Is the image a realistic photo depicting a mountain camping scene at dusk?
Is the image captured with a wide-angle perspective?
Is there exactly one khaki tent positioned in the right-center of the frame?
Is the door flap of the tent rolled halfway up to the left?
Are there exactly 2 sleeping bags inside the tent toward the back, placed side by side?
Is the sleeping bag on the left dark blue with a regular quilted surface?
Is the sleeping bag on the right metallic silver reflective with obvious wrinkles?
Are there exactly 2 silver-gray inflatable sleeping pads beneath the sleeping bags?
Are the sleeping pads parallel to the tent opening direction with edges slightly puffed?
Are there exactly 3 hiking backpacks leaning diagonally at the left front of the tent?
Is the backpack at the very front red?
Is the backpack in the middle (behind the red one) black?
Do all three backpacks have shoulder straps hanging down to the ground?
Are there exactly 2 camping lanterns hanging above the tent entrance?
Is the left lantern black-bodied with warm light pointing down?
Is the right lantern small, gray-bodied with cool light pointing down?
Is there a circle of gray stones forming a campfire ring positioned to the left of center?
Are the flames inside the campfire ring bright green and illuminating the inner sides of the stones?
Is there exactly 1 matte black metal tripod spanning above the campfire ring?
Is there exactly 1 matte black kettle hanging from the center of the tripod?
Is the kettle's handle upright and the spout facing to the right?
Are there exactly 6 thin firewood pieces stacked to the right of the campfire ring?
Is the firewood stacked neatly in two layers alternating top and bottom?
Does the firewood have light brown bark with cut ends facing the camera?
Are there exactly 4 white enamel cups placed horizontally in a row in front of the campfire ring?
Do all 4 cups have a thin blue rim on the mouth and handles facing to the right?
Are there exactly 3 wooden skewers with marshmallows placed in front of the cups?
Is the left marshmallow slightly charred, the center one bright blue, and the right one golden yellow?
Do all three wooden skewer tips point to the lower left?
Is there a spread-open map with obvious fold creases and yellowish paper in the lower left of the frame?
Is the upper right corner of the map weighted down by a brass compass with a round reflective glass face?
Is there exactly 1 pair of binoculars resting on a rock to the upper left of the map?
Are the binocular lens tubes pointing toward the upper right of the frame?
Are there exactly 2 pairs of brown hiking boots side by side in the lower right near the tent entrance?
Do the hiking boots have mud spots on the uppers and do all toe tips face left?
Are there exactly 2 trekking poles crossed on the ground to the right of the hiking boots?
